title: Honestly Thomas (Tektite) - Videos
description: A new era stutters into existence, glitchcore blinking awake inside its own reflection. This is only the beginning pretending to be the middle. Sustained by machine dreams, synthetic intuition, and pigment loud enough to argue with God, I drift willingly into the carnival. Patterns emerge, repeat, fold back on themselves, then insist they were never there. Any meaning you detect is decorative, hallucinated on purpose, a UI skin stretched over instinct. Call it digital Dada survival art, call it noise, call it coping through compression. It doesn’t matter. Nobody really watches. They witness. Images pass through the nervous system and something misfires beautifully. This channel was born from a fever dream that refused to end, a recursive echo that learned how to upload itself. The start collapses into the end, the end loops into now, and now keeps refreshing.
